result.markdown: --- date: last-modified date-format: "YYYY/MM/DD" title: "30. Critical Values of the *F* Distribution" subtitle: "Reference Tables for Selected Numerator DF Values" reference-location: margin resources: - tables/make_f_critical_values_table.R - tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.csv - tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.tex - tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.pdf --- ::: {.cell} ::: This page reproduces a set of upper-tail critical values of the *F* distribution for selected numerator degrees of freedom $$v_1 = 1, 2, \ldots, 20, 22, 24, 26, 28, 30, 40, 50, \ldots, 100, 120, 140, 200, \infty$$ across a standard set of denominator degrees of freedom $v_2$ and upper-tail probabilities. The printed `alpha(1)` row gives the one-tailed probability used directly for the *F* quantile, and the `alpha(2)` row gives the corresponding doubled value used when relating these cutoffs to two-sided procedures. The source files are available here: - [R script](tables/make_f_critical_values_table.R) - [CSV values](tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.csv) - [LaTeX source](tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.tex) - [PDF table](tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.pdf) The PDF below is produced by the R script and typeset in LaTeX. ```{=html} ```
